children.heading: .—Fund
children.label: 1 .—Fund
children.text: The term “Fund” means the Land and Water Conservation Fund established under .section 200302 of this title

children.heading: .—State
children.label: 2 .—State
children.text: The term “State” means a State, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Virgin Islands, and the Northern Mariana Islands.
